jobs.description: Short-term student job during school holidays. Tasks may include administrative support, customer service, or assisting internal teams. Open to students aged 17–26 for 2–4 weeks.
Internship for students graduating in 2027. Work with the Product & Growth team on marketing campaigns, analytics, and brand positioning.
Off-cycle internship program for undergraduate students. Involves supporting operations, financial processes, and product lifecycle activities.
Campus-based brand ambassador role. Promote products, organize events, and engage with student communities.
6-month internship (July–December). Assist legal teams with research, documentation, and case preparation.
Internship for students in law, compliance, or finance. Work on risk analysis, onboarding processes, and internal compliance checks.
Support digital campaigns, content creation, and product marketing. Requires student work authorization in Luxembourg.
Assist passengers at the airport information desk. Provide guidance, answer queries, and support daily operations.
6-month internship supporting event planning, coordination, and execution for business events in Luxembourg.
Collaborate with HR teams on organizational initiatives, cross-functional projects, and internal communication strategies.
